newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The latest disclosures are the January CES Dolphin EON launch and the Q4 2025 strategic-refocus call, both well before the window. The -6.8% move since June 9 is price/flow on a $80M micro-cap, not a fundamental event.

verdicts.rankRationale: Test-time-scaling/robotics bucket: consumer pool robots are a thin physical-AI proxy. No news since June 9; EON launch and Q4 refocus already known. Adjusted rank ~13 vs displayed 12 unchanged, so hold.
verdicts.bull: Dolphin EON line and robotics-only refocus deepen consumer-automation/physical-AI positioning at a beaten-down micro-cap valuation.
verdicts.neutral: Real autonomous-cleaning robotics, but consumer pool niche is far from compute-scaling theses.
verdicts.bear: Deep -44% YTD, $80M cap, soft demand; robotics relevance to scaling is tangential.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: EON ramp and execution on the cost/procurement turnaround plan.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Consumer-discretionary weakness; micro-cap liquidity and margin pressure.
